rationale: Educ. Code §21.257 governs hearing examiner recommendations in teacher termination or suspension proceedings. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 21.257. RECOMMENDATION OF HEARING EXAMINER. (a) Except as provided by Subsection (f), not later than the 60th day after the date on which the commissioner receives a teacher's written request for a hearing, the hearing examiner shall complete the hearing and make a written recommendation that:
_note: No conflict. The rule text concerns teacher employment hearing procedures and is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
